message:
feat(sdk): add sendToPage IPC and onKeyBinding callback

Add SDK-level bidirectional IPC:
- sendToPage(message): send messages to page via window.__termweb
- onKeyBinding(callback): receive key binding events from SDK

Dashboard now uses SDK IPC for key actions instead of WebSocket relay.
Key bindings are handled at terminal level (Zig), not page level.

Also includes:
- Background metrics polling for instant initial load
- Async lsof for faster process port lookup
- Smoothed sorting values to prevent process list jumping
